mapper.select:
WITH SOURCE AS ( SELECT TBCI.ID, CASE WHEN TBCI.SOURCE = '30' THEN '货转' WHEN TBCI.SOURCE = '50' THEN '混配' when TBCI.SOURCE = '20' then '集港' when tbci.SOURCE = '10' then '卸船' ELSE COALESCE( TBCI.IS_TOS, CASE WHEN TBT.TYPE = '拆箱集港' THEN '集港' ELSE TBT.TYPE END ) END "source" FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBCI.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID ), sg_tbt as ( select distinct TBTC3.ID,TBTC3.CARGO_INFO_ID ,TBTC3.TRUST_ID from T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC3 join T_BUS_TRUST TBT2 on TBTC3.TRUST_ID = TBT2.ID where TBT2.TYPE = '疏港' and TBTC3.HAS_STOP = '0' ) , STORAGE_RATE AS ( SELECT TBCC.COMPANY_ID, TBC.CUSTOMER_ID, TBC.START_TIME, TBC.END_TIME, TBCR.CARGO_CODE, TBCR.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS FROM T_BUS_CONTRACT_COMPANY TBCC JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC ON ( TBC.STATUS = '20' AND TBCC.CONTRACT_ID = TBC.ID ) JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT_RATE TBCR ON ( TBCR.TYPE = '10' AND TBCR.RATE_ITEM_CODE = 'MS00240' AND TBC.ID = TBCR.CONTRACT_ID ) GROUP BY TBCC.COMPANY_ID, TBC.CUSTOMER_ID, TBC.START_TIME, TBC.END_TIME, TBCR.CARGO_CODE, TBCR.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS ORDER BY TBCR.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS DESC ) select * from ( SELECT SOURCE."source", TBCI.ID, TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO, TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, SGTBT.id "trust_cargo_id",
TRUNC ( NVL (TBCI.REAL_CLEAR_DATE, SYSDATE) - CASE SOURCE."source" WHEN '卸船' THEN TDSI.WORK_START_TIME WHEN '集港' THEN WEIGH_JG."minWeighOutDt" WHEN '货转' THEN TBCI.TRANSFER_DATE WHEN '混配' THEN TBCMR.MIX_TIME END - CASE SOURCE."source" WHEN '卸船' THEN MIN(STORAGE_RATE.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS) WHEN '集港' THEN MIN(STORAGE_RATE.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS) WHEN '货转' THEN TBCI.RESIDUE_STORAGE WHEN '混配' THEN TBCI.MIX_FREE_STORAGE_DAYS END, 0 ) "overdueDays", TBCI.STATEMENT_STATUS_CODE STATEMENT_STATUS, CASE TO_CHAR (TBCI.IS_CLEAR) WHEN '0' THEN '否' WHEN '1' THEN '是' END "isClearLabel" FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI join sg_tbt SGTBT on SGTBT.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.id JOIN SOURCE ON ( TBCI.ID = SOURCE.ID AND SOURCE."source" IN ('卸船', '集港', '货转', '混配') ) LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBCI.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID left join T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC2 on TBTC2.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.id and TBTC2.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID
LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS ON TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = TDS.ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI.ID JOIN M_CARGO MC ON ( MC.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND TBCI.CARGO_CODE = MC.CARGO_CODE ) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID, MIN(TEMP.WEIGH_OUT_DT) "minWeighOutDt" FROM ( SELECT TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID, VWI.WEIGH_OUT_DT FROM ( SELECT TBTC.BUSINESS_NO, TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID AND TBT.TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港') ) TEMP JOIN V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI ON VWI.IS_OLD = '否' AND TEMP.BUSINESS_NO = VWI.PLAN_NO UNION ALL SELECT TO_NUMBER (VWI2.CARGO_INFO_ID), VWI2.WEIGH_OUT_DT FROM V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI2 WHERE VWI2.IS_OLD = '是' AND VWI2.PLAN_TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港') ) TEMP GROUP BY TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID ) WEIGH_JG ON TBCI.ID = WEIGH_JG.CARGO_INFO_ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_MIX_RECORD TBCMR ON TBCI.ID = TBCMR.CARGO_INFO_ID LEFT JOIN STORAGE_RATE ON ( TBCI.COMPANY_ID = STORAGE_RATE.COMPANY_ID AND TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_ID = STORAGE_RATE.CUSTOMER_ID AND to_char ( CASE SOURCE."source" WHEN '卸船' THEN TDSI.WORK_START_TIME WHEN '集港' THEN WEIGH_JG."minWeighOutDt" WHEN '货转' THEN TBCI.TRANSFER_DATE WHEN '混配' THEN TBCMR.MIX_TIME END, 'yyyy-MM-dd' ) >= to_char (STORAGE_RATE.START_TIME, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AND to_char ( CASE SOURCE."source" WHEN '卸船' THEN TDSI.WORK_START_TIME WHEN '集港' THEN WEIGH_JG."minWeighOutDt" WHEN '货转' THEN TBCI.TRANSFER_DATE WHEN '混配' THEN TBCMR.MIX_TIME END, 'yyyy-MM-dd' ) <= to_char (STORAGE_RATE.END_TIME, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AND TBCI.CARGO_CODE = STORAGE_RATE.CARGO_CODE ) WHERE TBCI.IS_SETTLE_STORAGE = '1' and TBTC2.id is not null and has_stop = '0' and TBTC2.IS_STOP = '10' GROUP BY SOURCE."source", TBTC2.id, TBCI.ID, TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO, TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_ID, TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, MC.SIGN, TBCI.CARGO_NAME, MC.WORK_TYPE, TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TDS.SHIP_NAME, TDSI.VOYAGE, TDS.SCN, TDS.BERTH_TIME, TDSI.WORK_START_TIME, TDSI.WORK_END_TIME, TDS.LEAVE_BERTH_TIME, TDSI.LOAD_UNLOAD, TDSI.IMP_EXP, TBCI.TRADE_TYPE, WEIGH_JG."minWeighOutDt", TBCI.TRANSFER_DATE, TBCMR.MIX_TIME, TBCI.CLEAR_BY_NAME, TBCI.REAL_CLEAR_DATE, TBT.TRUST_NO, TBT.RELEASE_TIME, TBCI.COMPANY_ID, TBCI.COMPANY_NAME, TBCI.CLEAR_DATE, TBCI.RESIDUE_STORAGE, TBCI.MIX_FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, TBCI.STATEMENT_STATUS_CODE, TBCI.IS_CLEAR, TBCI.CREATE_TIME, SGTBT.id ) where "overdueDays" =1

update.foreach: update T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO set HAS_STOP = '1', IS_STOP = '20' where id = #{item,jdbcType=BIGINT}
